briefdescription.para: Number of command entries per region.
Number of Read and write regions.
Write Direction Flag.
Read Direction Flag.
Full Mode.
Basic Mode.
Static Mode.
Streaming Mode.
System Init Mode.
Master Width - 32.
Master Width - 64.
Slave Width - 32.
Slave Width - 64.
PARAM Block Size (1KB)
Cmd RAM Block Size (4KB)
Extended CMDRAM Block Size (1KB)
Parameter RAM (2KB)
Command RAM (8KB)
Master RAM (8KB)
Error Interrupt Handler.
Master Complete Interrupt Handler.
XTrafGen_ReadCoreRevision reads revision of core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_ReadIdWidth reads M_ID_WIDTH.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_StartMasterLogic starts traffic generator master logic.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_IsMasterLogicDone checks for traffic generator master logic completed bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: TRUE if master logic completed. FALSE if master logic not completed.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_LoopEnable loops through the command set created using CMDRAM and PARAMRAM indefinitely in Advanced mode/Basic mode of ATG.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_LoopDisable Disables the loop bit in Master control regiset in Advanced mode/Basic mode of ATG.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_WriteSlaveControlReg enables control bits of Slave Control Register.

detaileddescription.para: This API will write the value passed from the user.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
is the Slave Control Register value to set

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XTrafGen_WriteSlaveControlReg(XTrafGen *InstancePtr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_CheckforMasterComplete checks for master complete.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: TRUE if master complete bit is set. FALSE if master complete bit is not set.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_ReadErrors read master and slave errors.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Both Master and Slave error value.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_EnableMasterCmpInterrupt enables Master logic complete bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_ClearMasterCmpInterrupt clear Master logic complete interrupt bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_ClearErrors clear errors specified in Mask.

detaileddescription.para: The corresponding error for each bit set to 1 in Mask, will be enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
contains a bit mask of the errors to clear. The mask can be formed using a set of bit wise or'd values from the definitions in xtrafgen_hw.h file.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XTrafGen_ClearErrors(XTrafGen *InstancePtr, u32 Mask)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_EnableErrors enable errors specified in Mask.

detaileddescription.para: The corresponding error for each bit set to 1 in Mask, will be enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
contains a bit mask of the errors to enable. The mask can be formed using a set of bit wise or'd values from the definitions in xtrafgen_hw.h file.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XTrafGen_EnableErrors(XTrafGen *InstancePtr, u32 Mask)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_MasterErrIntrEnable enables Global Master error bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_MasterErrIntrDisable disables Global Master error bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_SlaveErrIntrEnable enables Global Slave error bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_SlaveErrIntrDisable disables Global Slave error bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_ReadConfigStatus reads Config status register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_StaticEnable enable the traffic generation when the core is configured Static Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_StaticDisable disables the traffic generation on the Axi TrafGen when the core is configured in Static Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_StaticVersion returns the version value for the Axi TrafGen When configured in Static Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_SetStaticBurstLen Configures the Burst Length for AxiTrafGen In Static Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
is the Burst length to set in the Static length register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XTrafGen_SetStaticBurstLen(XTrafGen *InstancePtr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_GetStaticBurstLen Gets the Burst Length for AxiTrafGen in StaticMode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_GetStaticTransferDone gets the state of Transfer done bit in Control register When the TraficGen is configured in Static Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Value of the Transfer Done bit.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_SetStaticTransferDone sets the Transfer done bit in Control register When AxiTrafGen is Configured in Static Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_IsStaticTransferDone checks for reset value When Static Traffic generation Completed by reading Control Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: TRUE if reset Success full FALSE if failed to reset

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_StreamEnable enable the traffic generation on the Axi TrafGen When the core is configured in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_StreamDisable Disable the traffic generation on the Axi TrafGen When core is configured in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_StreamVersion returns the version value for the Axi TrafGen When configured in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_SetStreamingTransLen Configures the length of transaction for AxiTrafGen in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
is the transfer length to set in the transfer length Register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XTrafGen_SetStreamingTransLen(XTrafGen *InstancePtr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_GetStreamingTransLen Gets the length of transaction for AxiTrafGen in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_GetStreamingTransCnt Gets the transfer count for AxiTrafGen in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_SetStreamingRandomLen Configures the random transaction length for AxiTrafGen in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
is the random length that's need to be Configure in the Streaming Config register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XTrafGen_SetStreamingRandomLen(XTrafGen *InstancePtr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_GetStreamingProgDelay Gets the Programmable Delay for AxiTrafGen in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_SetStreamingTransCnt Configures the transfer count for AxiTrafGen in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
is the transfer length that needs to be configured in Transfer length register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XTrafGen_SetStreamingTransCnt(XTrafGen *InstancePtr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_SetStreamingProgDelay Configures the Programmable Delay for AxiTrafGen in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
is the value that's need to be configure in the Stream Config Register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XTrafGen_SetStreamingProgDelay(XTrafGen *InstancePtr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_SetStreamingTdestPort Configures the Value to drive on TDEST port for Axi TrafGen in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
is the Port value that's need to be set.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XTrafGen_SetStreamingTdestPort(XTrafGen *InstancePtr, u8 Value)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_SetTransferDone sets the Transfer done bit in Control register When AxiTrafGen is Configured in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_IsStreamingTransferDone checks for reset value When Streaming Traffic generation is Completed by reading Stream Control Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: TRUE if reset Success full FALSE if failed to reset

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_ResetStreamingRandomLen resets the random transaction length for AxiTrafGen in Streaming Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Command Ram word fields.
Parameter Ram word fields.
Command structure exposed to user.

detaileddescription.para: This structure should be updated by user with required configuration

briefdescription.para: Command Entry structure.

detaileddescription.para: This structure denotes each entry of 256 commands.

briefdescription.para: The configuration structure for Traffic Generator device.

detaileddescription.para: This structure passes the hardware building information to the driver

briefdescription.para: Command Information Structure.

detaileddescription.para: This structure is maintained by the driver

briefdescription.para: The XTrafGen driver instance data.

detaileddescription.para: An instance must be allocated for each Traffic Generator device in use.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a AXI Traffic Generator device.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using a AXI Traffic Generator Device. Initializing a engine includes setting up the register base address, setting up the instance data, and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi Traffic Generator instance to be worked on.
references the structure holding the hardware configuration for the Axi Traffic Generator core to initialize.

is the device base address in the virtual memory address space. The caller is responsible for keeping the address mapping from EffectiveAddr to the device physical base address unchanged once this function is invoked. Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping changes after this function is called. If address translation is not used, use Config->BaseAddress for this parameters, passing the physical address instead.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM if pointer to the configuration structure is NULL

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: The XTrafGen_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration found or NULL if the specified device ID/BaseAddress was not found. See xtrafgen.h for the definition of XTrafGen_Config.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Add a command to the software list of commands.

detaileddescription.para: This function prepares the four Command Words and one Parameter Word from the Command structure passed from the user application. It then adds to a list of commands (maintained in the software). Both CMDRAM and PARAMRAM are divided into two regions, one for reads and one for writes. Each region can hold 256 commands with each entry containing four Command RAM words and one Parameter RAM word.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
is a pointer to Command structure.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if reached max number of command entries

briefdescription.para: Get last Valid Command Index of Write/Read region.

detaileddescription.para: The last valid command index is used to set 'my_depend' and 'other_depend' fields of the Command RAM (Word 2).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
specifies a Read or Write Region

briefdescription.para: Write Commands to internal Command and Parameter RAMs.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes all the prepared commands to hardware.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS if successful
XST_FAILURE if programming internal RAMs failed

memberdef.argsstring: (XTrafGen *InstancePtr, u32 Offset, int Length, u8 RdWrFlag, u32 *Data)
memberdef.name: XTrafGen_AccessMasterRam

briefdescription.para: Write or Read Master RAM.

detaileddescription.para:
The MSTRAM has 8 KB of internal RAM used for the following:
Take data from this RAM for write transactions
Store data to this RAM for read transaction

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.
is the offset value in Master RAM.
is the size of data to write/read.
specifies whether to write or read
is the pointer to array which contains data to write or reads data into.

briefdescription.para: Display Command Entry values.

detaileddescription.para: This function prints all the 256 entries of both write and read regions with each entry containing four command words and parameter word.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Erase all Command Entry values.

detaileddescription.para: This function erases all the 256 entries of both write and read regions with each entry containing four command words and parameter word.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Axi TrafGen instance to be worked on.

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS if successful
XST_FAILURE if programming internal RAMs failed
